transitionPatterns.description: New screen stacks from right with scrim over current screen.

transitionPatterns.description: Tab content choreography: slide + staggered fade.

transitionPatterns.description: Skeleton pulse — neutral 2100 → 2400 → 2100, staggered per element.
transitionPatterns.name: Skeleton

transitionPatterns.description: Card morphs into modal — position, size, and radius animate together.
transitionPatterns.name: Transform
